title: V (HS/OS) Expansion of the Potala Palace in the 17th Century: Avalokiteśvara’s (Guanyin/Kannon) Sacred Site (Heinz Götze Visiting Professor Xie Jisheng, Fraser)
organisation: Institute of East Asian Art History
further_info: Recommended Reading Course Readings: -Xie Jisheng. “The Mythology of Tibetan Mountain Gods: An Overview.” Slavica (Oct. 2001), v. 16, n. 6: 343-63.姜怀英。《中国古代建筑：西藏布达拉宫》。北京：文物出版社，1996. -姜怀英。《中国古代建筑：西藏布达拉宫》。北京：文物出版社，1996。Jiang Huaiying.
